project_type: Go AWS CDK infrastructure project with a Lambda processor
build_system: go build / CDK CLI (Node.js required for cdk synth)
test_framework: Go testing package with CDK assertions (cdk-base_test.go, pipeline_test.go) and unit tests with mocks (lambda/processor/main_test.go)
verification_instructions: 1. Run `NODE_OPTIONS='' GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct go test -v -count=1 ./...` - all tests must pass. 2. Run `NODE_OPTIONS='' GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct npx cdk synth` for CDK synthesis (requires aws-cdk installed).
snapshot_or_generated_files: testdata/snapshot.json - generated by TestStackSnapshotStability test on first run if missing. Delete and re-run tests to regenerate.
setup_instructions: 1. GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct go mod download (root module). 2. cd lambda/processor && GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct go mod download. 3. npm install -g aws-cdk (for cdk synth).
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can download from proxy.golang.org and npm registry. Must set NODE_OPTIONS='' to avoid missing proxy-bootstrap.js error. Must set GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct for Go module downloads.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD (write failing tests first). Conventional commits. Keep ARCHITECTURE.md in sync with code changes. Run go test ./... and cdk synth before pushing.
key_patterns: CDK assertions for infrastructure tests. Mock interfaces (S3Client, DynamoDBClient, PollyClient) in lambda/processor/main_test.go. Snapshot test in testdata/snapshot.json. Multi-environment support via getEnvContext. Pipeline stack conditionally instantiated.
directory_structure: Root: CDK Go app (cdk-base.go, pipeline.go) with tests. lambda/processor/: Lambda function with its own go.mod. .github/workflows/ci.yml: CI pipeline. testdata/: snapshot golden file (generated on first test run).
